Sun Song (Binshuo) еӯ«еө© (иі“зў©)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Sun Song (еӯ«еө©), styledBinshuo (иі“зў©). Sheltered Zhao Qi, who later praised him to Liu Biao. Sun Song was affiliated with the Han Dynasty.
